title: AI Tool Usage in Drafting HB 570 / SB 738 — Abortion Homicide Penalty Legislation 2026

communications.subject: Tennessee Public Records Act Request: AI Tool Usage in Drafting HB 570 / SB 738 — Abortion Homicide Penalty Legislation 2026
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. All drafts, notes, and documents related to drafting this legislation from January 1, 2025 to present
2. All records reflecting use of artificial intelligence tools including but not limited to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, or similar services in connection with this legislation, including prompts submitted and outputs received
3. All contracts or subscriptions with AI service providers maintained by this office
All communications with the Foundation to Abolish Abortion, the Southern Baptist Convention, and any other outside organizations regarding this legislation
4. All internal communications including emails, texts, and direct messages discussing this legislation from January 1, 2025 to present
5. I request a fee waiver on public interest grounds. If any records are withheld please identify the specific exemption claimed for each withheld record.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Ellen Dickinson.
